4000 

FILE(S): Practice 

SOURCE: Million Hearts Data Registry 

VALUES: EX — 15161718,15161719 
Null/missing 

COMMENT: The first six digits of each CMS Certification Number (CCN) are the facility number; additional digits 
(i.e., positions 7–13) may be used to distinguish between campuses for multiple campus hospitals. This 
field could be missing or have one or more CCNs, separated by a comma. 

Note that if attempting to join to Medicare claims files in the CCW, the 6-digit CCN is called
